# miniaudio

Vendored [miniaudio](https://github.com/mackron/miniaudio) v0.11.22 (`miniaudio.h` only).

Used by Lab 03 (`AudioCore.cpp` defines `MINIAUDIO_IMPLEMENTATION`).

If the header is missing:

```bash
curl -fsSL -o third_party/miniaudio/miniaudio.h \
  https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mackron/miniaudio/0.11.22/miniaudio.h
```
